tagline: A card of icon + label navigation shortcuts with trailing chevrons.
whenToUse: Use Quick Links for a compact dashboard card of pure navigation shortcuts — icon, label, and a trailing chevron per row, in one or two columns. It carries no metrics or state; reach for Metric Card or Statistics Card when a shortcut should also surface a number. External destinations open in a new tab and are announced as such. Pair with Recent Activity and Progress Summary to build a landing dashboard.
